reviews.review_title: Awesome game, works your reaction time
reviews.review_description:
The game is awesome, my absolute favourite is the American football mode. I never had a chance to play in a team due to being in Europe. So just experiencing what it feels like to get the ball and players just running at you, meanwhile you need to make a decision to do the pass. It’s truly amazing.
Try it out!
This game is great for goal keeping, defending and many more for football totally worth to try
Nice physics really good game this is a good upcoming game
Really brilliant game so fun and good workout
The goat me blu
Me and my daughter are addicted to this game , it’s really really good fun and challenging , some of the heading ones are really tough but still it’s great fun

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing support! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
It means a lot to hear that you and your daughter are enjoying the game together — that’s exactly what we love to see! 💛

Some of those heading drills can definitely be tough, but we're glad you're both having fun with the challenge. 🙌

Also, we spotted your post on socials — thank you for sharing the love! That kind of support keeps us going. 🫶
See you back out there soon! ⚽💥
(UP THE ORDSALL)!

reviews.review_description:
It's a fantastic heading game. I play a lot of soccer (heading). I particularly enjoy the monthly challenges (header and goalkeeper).
As a suggestion for improvement: the goal net could swing when the ball hits it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the awesome feedback and 5-star vibes! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
We love that you're diving into the header and goalkeeper challenges — it’s great to hear from real players who enjoy that side of the game!

Your suggestion about the net swinging when hit is a great one — and you’ll be glad to know that improving physics (including net reactions!) is something we’re actively exploring across all our titles. ⚙️⚽

If you haven’t tried it yet, definitely check out Premier League Player — it brings real match moments to life and is built to keep pushing the realism even further. 🔥

Thanks again for playing and being part of the journey — see you on the pitch!

reviews.review_description:
I really love the concept of this app, and it can be very fun, but it is INCREDIBLY unbalanced. 
There is a heading challenge for shooting, and you have to get at least a silver badge to advance to the next level. There are 30 levels and once you reach halfway, you start recreating famous goals. By the time you reach Huth v Spurs, you're expected to score a header to the top corner like a professional from 15 yards out at least 3 times out of 10.  Unfortunately, like 99% of people, I'm not a professional soccer player, and this is almost impossible to complete.  I don't understand why they made the score limits to reach silver become almost impossible, but I purchased this game because I loved this part of the app, and now that I own it, I'm stuck and will probably  never get to finish it. 
Balance your game so I can experience more of it without being a professional athlete!!!
Update: I was wrong. I hit the gold top corner 3 out of 10 times and still didn't get enough points for a silver badge. I genuinely think the player Robert Huth himself would struggle to complete this challenge. PLEASE lower the score limit for Silver Badges! (Or just allow bronze to advance)
I will rate 5 stars once this gets patched, OR if I watch one of the developers stream this and attempt to get a silver badge on the Morata header. I guarantee they'd try on stream for hours without succeeding. that's NOT FUN. I should NOT be restricted from a game's content because I'm not a top class professional athlete.

reviews.review_title: Love the all the sports challenges
reviews.review_description: Great programme fun and addictive to play - good tips and effects well done makers - great to stand on the pitches and get a feel for the environment! If there’s any way of adding some sort of crowd experience that would be cool but love the game df UK

reviews.review_description: We got this game to keep our interest up in sports (and a healthy side of fitness) during the summer break. Not only does it allow us to practice technique across a number of sports in a very simple and fun way, with the growing rate of long term brain injuries being seen in contact sports, this game allows my son to practice heading skills without the risk of this. Screen sharing is surprisingly fun and the scoring adds a competitive element into the house! Great fun and another 5 star game from the team at Rezzil!

developer_response.body: Hey LuxeyVR  Many thanks for the 5 STAR review score and the amazing feedback. Were glad to be making such a positive impact and fun for all the family and hope to see you climbing the leader boards soon! TEAM REZZIL

reviews.review_title: Its training + workout but needs more!
reviews.review_description:
Really enjoy this training for my soccer drills, would like to be able to skip a drill though if I can’t pass it and come back to it. Football drills are fun too and the rest is kinda of a one time play to beat your personal best and the games are okay. I wish it had more content so if they add more soon would be awesome. Maybe add drills for tennis, actual basketball shooting and passing drills, and expand on some of your drills in the future to have 3d players around the drills to actually try to defend you as you complete the drills. The game is really good though can’t wait to see what you do with it. Please implement a skip AND show us the score needed in game, I can never tell how many points I need to pass the level. Another thing, I think flicking the trigger not only may wear out the trigger on the controller but it's a bit of an unnatural motion that causes you to regrip the controller as you throw, maybe allow us to remap it to any of the free buttons like the lower trigger? Thanks!

Summary
- Add more content (Tennis, Basketball shooting, live drills with players)
- Show score needed to pass or get bronze/silver/gold in game
- Add more games
- Allow remapping of flick trigger
- Allow skipping of levels to come back to them later

Also in regards to music, to get around the licensing issue just include a youtube player in game like Golf+ does and. you don't have to worry about that part.

developer_response.body:
Hi WhiteMic_YT 
Firstly, thanks so much for the time taken to give such constructive and valuable feedback. As a developer its fantastic to receive.
We will work some of these comments into our backlog! The great news though is most are already underway, and we have a whole host of content and new sport updates coming thick and fast in 2022!  We’ll look for you in the leader boards, and again thankyou so much for the positives and the things to work on.

reviews.review_description: Good idea, especially for working out, but very undeveloped game. I got stuck on Aztec level 9 only after 30 minutes of playing and there is no way around it. Balls are comming too slow, no additional tools to beat this level. Same for the other levels. Head kicks are very boring  and impossible to get through. Maybe only 30-40 of progressive playing, but after this just getting stuck. I am not impressed at this point. This game is desperate for updates.

developer_response.body:
Hey this hurts let's be honest... no developer wants a 1 star,  but we value everyone's feedback. We have some hints and tips in the tutorials and I guarantee that Aztec is a passable level. Our email is info@rezzil.com should you want to engage more and we can advise on how to level up the skills, and we would be happy to help in any way. Ultimately we may be trying to sell suntan lotion to a polar bear, but give it another go? We are also adding content and additional sports and games each month. Have a great week- Team Rezzil.
Additional Info-  TEAM REZZIL Have applied considerable updates- if you feel able please re-review and see all the great new content we have added.

We've been getting some super positive comments and feedback on the latest improvements… That's not to say we won’t keep pushing, perhaps try jumping in the earlier levels rather than straight into the Challenge and get a feel for the drills first. Reaction wall isn't easy in later levels (especially the low-down squat touches). Hope you stick with us and see you in the leader board! Thanks Team REZZIL

developer_response.body: Hey, Thanks for the Review, we have lots more coming and have unlocked some DLC for free right now. Trust us when we can flip our PCVR foot tracked games over..WE WILL! See you in the Leaderboards!

reviews.review_description:
I especially like the header drills that seems to be the game mode with most depth and work. I like the game situations with the passing scenarios that requires you to be able to read the play and be aware of your surroundings and make quick decisions. 

The other games are OK. The one i play most besides the header drills are the basketball game, but in my opinion it's not so much a basketball based game besides the fact that the ball is a basketball. But it's a fun concept! 

Otherwise it's a great game for developing your reaction time, awareness and decision making in sports. 

For five stars I think the game needs more content, and more in depth gameplay in other categories of sports. I know the developers are working on adding more sports and content, but I hope the new sports that hopefully will be added soon are more like the header drills gameplay wise.

I would especially love too be able to play ice hockey that has the same concept and depth that the headers mode have. Like the ability to make quick decisions from a blue line position in a powerplay or from standing in Gretzky position behind net and make saucer passes. Or the ability to shoot one timers and try to score, like the header drills when you can score goals from different scenarios. I hope that it's an idea that's realistic to be applied in the game, especially when hockey comes with the possibility to work well with the puck- and stick handling in virtual reality. 

Add this with inspiration from the Sense Arena hockey game and I think this game is a 5/5.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the detailed review and feedback Kristoffer, rest assured there is plenty more to come!

reviews.review_description:

Would like to see more football related addons  such as goalkeeper training
